sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76356" key="o)yomanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψο-μᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n76356.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mad after dainties</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:167" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.167</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
